title: astropanax elatus
intro: Astropanax elatus, also known as the Chinese milk vetch or Astragalus, is a perennial plant species native to China, belonging to the Fabaceae family. The medicinal properties of Astropanax elatus lie in its roots, which contain isoflavones and other bioactive compounds, exhibiting anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties. The health benefits of the plant include its ability to boost the immune system, reduce stress and anxiety, and improve overall well-being. Astropanax elatus can be prepared as a decoction, tea, or capsule, and is often used in traditional Chinese medicine to prevent and treat various health conditions.
